172→        viewModel.onCartCreated(CHECKOUT_DETAILS)
173→
174→        viewModel.onCheckoutResult(CHECKOUT_EVENT)
175→
176→        verify(wizardManager).showNextStep()
177→    }
178→
179→    @Test
180→    fun `on checkout result when not null updates result`() {
181→        viewModel.onCartCreated(CHECKOUT_DETAILS)
182→
183→        viewModel.onCheckoutResult(CHECKOUT_EVENT)
184→
185→        assertIs<DomainRegistrationPurchased>(currentWizardState(viewModel).result).run {
186→            assertEquals(CHECKOUT_DETAILS.site, site)
187→            assertEquals(CHECKOUT_EVENT.domainName, domainName)
188→            assertEquals(CHECKOUT_EVENT.email, email)
189→        }
190→    }
191→
192→
193→    @Test
194→    fun `on checkout result when not null tracks domain purchase success`() {
195→        viewModel.onCartCreated(CHECKOUT_DETAILS)
196→        viewModel.onCheckoutResult(CHECKOUT_EVENT)
197→        verify(domainsRegistrationTracker).trackDomainsPurchaseDomainSuccess(true)
198→    }
199→
200→    @Test
201→    fun `on site created updates result`() = test {
202→        viewModel.onDomainsScreenFinished(FREE_DOMAIN)
203→        viewModel.onFreeSiteCreated(SITE_MODEL)
204→        assertThat(currentWizardState(viewModel).result).isEqualTo(RESULT_NOT_IN_LOCAL_DB)
205→    }
206→
207→    @Test
208→    fun `on site created for free domain shows next step`() {
209→        viewModel.onDomainsScreenFinished(FREE_DOMAIN).run { clearInvocations(wizardManager) }
210→        viewModel.onFreeSiteCreated(SITE_MODEL)
211→        verify(wizardManager).showNextStep()
212→    }
213→
214→    @Test
215→    fun `on site created for paid domain does not show next step`() {
216→        viewModel.onDomainsScreenFinished(PAID_DOMAIN).run { clearInvocations(wizardManager) }
217→        viewModel.onFreeSiteCreated(SITE_MODEL)
218→        verifyNoMoreInteractions(wizardManager)
219→    }
220→
221→    @Test
222→    fun onBackPressedPropagatedToWizardManager() {
223→        viewModel.onBackPressed()
224→        verify(wizardManager).onBackPressed()
225→    }
226→
227→    @Test
228→    fun onSiteIntentSkippedPropagatedToWizardManager() {
229→        viewModel.onSiteIntentSkipped()
230→        verify(wizardManager).showNextStep()
231→    }
232→
233→    @Test
234→    fun onSiteIntentSelectedPropagatedToWizardManager() {
235→        viewModel.onSiteIntentSelected(VERTICAL)
236→        assertThat(currentWizardState(viewModel).siteIntent).isEqualTo(VERTICAL)
237→        verify(wizardManager).showNextStep()
238→    }
239→
240→    @Test
241→    fun backNotSuppressedWhenNotLastStep() {
242→        whenever(wizardManager.isLastStep()).thenReturn(false)
243→        viewModel.onBackPressed()
244→        verify(onBackPressedObserver).onChanged(anyOrNull())
245→    }
246→
247→    @Test
248→    fun backSuppressedWhenLastStep() {
249→        whenever(wizardManager.isLastStep()).thenReturn(true)
250→        viewModel.onBackPressed()
251→        verifyNoMoreInteractions(onBackPressedObserver)
252→    }
253→
254→    @Test
255→    fun dialogShownOnBackPressedWhenLastStepAndSiteCreationNotCompleted() {
256→        whenever(wizardManager.isLastStep()).thenReturn(true)
257→        viewModel.onWizardCancelled()
258→        viewModel.onBackPressed()
259→        verify(dialogActionsObserver).onChanged(any())
260→    }
261→
262→    @Test
263→    fun flowExitedOnBackPressedWhenLastStepAndSiteCreationCompleted() {
264→        whenever(wizardManager.isLastStep()).thenReturn(true)
265→        viewModel.onWizardFinished(RESULT_COMPLETED)
266→        viewModel.onBackPressed()
267→        verify(wizardExitedObserver).onChanged(anyOrNull())
268→    }
269→
270→    @Test
271→    fun flowExitedOnDialogPositiveButtonClicked() {
272→        viewModel.onPositiveDialogButtonClicked(TAG_WARNING_DIALOG)
273→        verify(wizardExitedObserver).onChanged(anyOrNull())
274→    }
275→
276→    @Test
277→    fun titleForFirstStepIsGeneralSiteCreation() {
278→        whenever(wizardManager.stepPosition(siteCreationStep)).thenReturn(FIRST_STEP_INDEX)
279→        assertThat(viewModel.screenTitleForWizardStep(siteCreationStep))
280→            .isInstanceOf(ScreenTitleGeneral::class.java)
281→    }
282→
283→    @Test
284→    fun titleForLastStepIsEmptyTitle() {
285→        whenever(wizardManager.stepPosition(siteCreationStep)).thenReturn(LAST_STEP_INDEX)
286→        assertThat(viewModel.screenTitleForWizardStep(siteCreationStep))
287→            .isInstanceOf(ScreenTitleEmpty::class.java)
288→    }
289→
290→    @Test
291→    fun titleForDomainStepIsChooseADomain() {
292→        whenever(siteCreationStep.name).thenReturn(SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS.name)
293→        assertThat(viewModel.screenTitleForWizardStep(siteCreationStep))
294→            .isEqualTo(ScreenTitleGeneral(R.string.new_site_creation_domain_header_title))
295→    }
296→
297→    @Test
298→    fun titlesForOtherThanFirstAndLastStepIsStepCount() {
299→        (FIRST_STEP_INDEX + 1 until LAST_STEP_INDEX).forEach { stepIndex ->
300→            whenever(wizardManager.stepPosition(siteCreationStep)).thenReturn(stepIndex)
301→
302→            assertThat(viewModel.screenTitleForWizardStep(siteCreationStep))
303→                .isInstanceOf(ScreenTitleStepCount::class.java)
304→        }
305→    }
306→
307→    @Test
308→    fun siteCreationStateWrittenToBundle() {
309→        viewModel.writeToBundle(savedInstanceState)
310→        verify(savedInstanceState).putParcelable(any(), argThat { this is SiteCreationState })
311→    }
312→
313→    @Test
314→    fun siteCreationStateRestored() {
315→        /* we need to model a real use case of data only existing for steps the user has visited (Segment only in
316→        this case). Otherwise, subsequent steps' state will be cleared and make the test fail. (issue #10189)*/
317→        val expectedState = SiteCreationState(segmentId = SEGMENT_ID)
318→        whenever(savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat<SiteCreationState>(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE))
319→            .thenReturn(expectedState)
320→
321→        // we need to create a new instance of the VM as the `viewModel` has already been started in setUp()
322→        val newViewModel = getNewViewModel()
323→        newViewModel.start(savedInstanceState, SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
324→
325→        /* we need to simulate navigation to the next step (Domain selection, see comment above) as
326→        wizardManager.showNextStep() isn't invoked when the VM is restored from a savedInstanceState. */
327→        wizardManagerNavigatorLiveData.value = SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS
328→
329→        newViewModel.navigationTargetObservable.observeForever(navigationTargetObserver)
330→        assertThat(currentWizardState(newViewModel)).isSameAs(expectedState)
331→    }
332→
333→    @Test
334→    fun siteCreationStepIndexRestored() {
335→        val index = 17
336→        whenever(savedInstanceState.getInt(KEY_CURRENT_STEP)).thenReturn(index)
337→
338→        // siteCreationState is not nullable - we need to set it
339→        whenever(savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat<SiteCreationState>(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE))
340→            .thenReturn(SiteCreationState())
341→
342→        // we need to create a new instance of the VM as the `viewModel` has already been started in setUp()
343→        val newViewModel = getNewViewModel()
344→        newViewModel.start(savedInstanceState, SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
345→
346→        verify(wizardManager).setCurrentStepIndex(index)
347→    }
348→
349→    @Test
350→    fun `given null instance state, when start, then site creation accessed including source is tracked`() {
351→        val newViewModel = getNewViewModel()
352→        newViewModel.start(null, SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
353→
354→        // Because setup is run before every test, we expect this to be tracked twice
355→        // Once on the first instantiation
356→        // Once on the new start
357→        verify(tracker, atLeastOnce()).trackSiteCreationAccessed(SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
358→    }
359→
360→    @Test
361→    fun `given instance state is not null, when start, then site creation accessed is not tracked`() {
362→        val expectedState = SiteCreationState(segmentId = SEGMENT_ID)
363→        whenever(savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat<SiteCreationState>(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE))
364→            .thenReturn(expectedState)
365→
366→        val newViewModel = getNewViewModel()
367→        newViewModel.start(savedInstanceState, SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
368→
369→        // Because setup is run before every test, we expect this to be tracked on that first instance only
370→        verify(tracker, times(1)).trackSiteCreationAccessed(SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
371→    }
372→
373→    private fun currentWizardState(vm: SiteCreationMainVM) = vm.navigationTargetObservable.lastEvent!!.wizardState
374→
375→    private fun getNewViewModel() = SiteCreationMainVM(
376→        tracker,
377→        wizardManager,
378→        networkUtils,
379→        dispatcher,
380→        fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase,
381→        imageManager,
382→        jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil,
383→        domainsRegistrationTracker,
384→    )
385→}

content.text:
I have updated the `RELEASE-NOTES.txt` file by adding the requested entry at the top of the `23.5` section. I followed the project's formatting guidelines, placing high-priority `[***]` items at the beginning of the version section.

Based on my analysis:
- The codebase is at version `23.4`, and `23.5` is the current development version where new release notes are being added.
- The feature described ("plan selection, domain selection, and checkout screens in site creation flow") is present in the codebase (e.g., in `SiteCreationMainVM.kt`, `SiteCreationStep.kt`, and several Compose-based fragments and view models).
- I used a single space after the priority indicator `[***]`, consistent with the format specified in the first line of `RELEASE-NOTES.txt` and most recent entries.
- I omitted the `(...)` from the final entry as it appeared to be a placeholder for a PR URL, which could not be definitively identified in the current codebase state, and most entries in `RELEASE-NOTES.txt` either have a full URL or none at all.

```txt
23.5
-----
* [***] Added plan selection, domain selection, and checkout screens in site creation flow
* [*] Block Editor: Split formatted text on triple Enter [https://github.com/WordPress/gutenberg/pull/53354]
...
```

I have verified the changes and ensured they align with the repository's style and the provided instructions.

 93→        ) : CreatedButNotFetched
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    @Parcelize
 97→    data class Completed(
 98→        override val site: SiteModel,
 99→    ) : Created
100→}

102→typealias SiteCreationCompletionEvent = Pair<SiteCreationResult, Boolean>
103→
104→@HiltViewModel
105→class SiteCreationMainVM @Inject constructor(
106→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
107→    private val wizardManager: WizardManager<SiteCreationStep>,
108→    private val networkUtils: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
109→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
110→    private val fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase: FetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase,
111→    private val imageManager: ImageManager,
112→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil: JetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil,
113→    private val domainsRegistrationTracker: DomainsRegistrationTracker,
114→) : ViewModel() {
115→    init {
116→        dispatcher.register(fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase)
117→    }
118→
119→    override fun onCleared() {
120→        super.onCleared()
121→        dispatcher.unregister(fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase)
122→    }
123→
124→    var siteCreationDisabled: Boolean = false
125→    private var isStarted = false
126→
127→    private lateinit var siteCreationState: SiteCreationState
128→
129→    internal var preloadingJob: Job? = null
130→
131→    val navigationTargetObservable: SingleEventObservable<NavigationTarget> by lazy {
132→        SingleEventObservable(
133→            wizardManager.navigatorLiveData.map {
134→                clearOldSiteCreationState(it)
135→                WizardNavigationTarget(it, siteCreationState)
136→            }
137→        )
138→    }
139→
140→    private val _dialogAction = SingleLiveEvent<DialogHolder>()
141→    val dialogActionObservable: LiveData<DialogHolder> = _dialogAction
142→
143→    private val _onCompleted = SingleLiveEvent<SiteCreationCompletionEvent>()
144→    val onCompleted: LiveData<SiteCreationCompletionEvent> = _onCompleted
145→
146→    private val _exitFlowObservable = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
147→    val exitFlowObservable: LiveData<Unit?> = _exitFlowObservable
148→
149→    private val _onBackPressedObservable = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
150→    val onBackPressedObservable: LiveData<Unit?> = _onBackPressedObservable
151→
152→    private val _showJetpackOverlay = MutableLiveData<Event<Boolean>>()
153→    val showJetpackOverlay: LiveData<Event<Boolean>> = _showJetpackOverlay
154→
155→    private val _showDomainCheckout = SingleLiveEvent<CheckoutDetails>()
156→    val showDomainCheckout: LiveData<CheckoutDetails> = _showDomainCheckout
157→
158→    fun start(savedInstanceState: Bundle?, siteCreationSource: SiteCreationSource) {
159→        if (isStarted) return
160→        if (savedInstanceState == null) {
161→            tracker.trackSiteCreationAccessed(siteCreationSource)
162→            siteCreationState = SiteCreationState()
163→            if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldShowSiteCreationOverlay())
164→                showJetpackOverlay()
165→            if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldDisableSiteCreation())
166→                siteCreationDisabled = true
167→            else
168→                showSiteCreationNextStep()
169→        } else {
170→            siteCreationState = requireNotNull(savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE))
171→            val currentStepIndex = savedInstanceState.getInt(KEY_CURRENT_STEP)
172→            wizardManager.setCurrentStepIndex(currentStepIndex)
173→        }
174→        isStarted = true
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun showSiteCreationNextStep() {
178→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun showJetpackOverlay() {
182→        _showJetpackOverlay.value = Event(true)
183→    }
184→
185→    fun preloadThumbnails(context: Context) {
186→        if (preloadingJob == null) {
187→            preloadingJob = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
188→                if (networkUtils.isNetworkAvailable()) {
189→                    val response = fetchHomePageLayoutsUseCase.fetchStarterDesigns()
190→
191→                    // Else clause added to better understand the reason that causes this crash:
192→                    // https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/17020
193→                    if (response.isError) {
194→                        AppLog.e(T.THEMES, "Error preloading starter designs: ${response.error}")
195→                        return@launch
196→                    } else if (response.designs == null) {
197→                        AppLog.e(T.THEMES, "Null starter designs response: $response")
198→                        return@launch
199→                    }
200→
201→                    for (design in response.designs) {
202→                        imageManager.preload(context, MShot(design.previewMobile))
203→                    }
204→                }
205→                preloadingJob = null
206→            }
207→        }
208→    }
209→
210→    fun writeToBundle(outState: Bundle) {
211→        outState.putInt(KEY_CURRENT_STEP, wizardManager.currentStep)
212→        outState.putParcelable(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE, siteCreationState)
213→    }
214→
215→    fun onSiteIntentSelected(intent: String?) {
216→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteIntent = intent)
217→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
218→    }
219→
220→    fun onSiteIntentSkipped() {
221→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteIntent = null)
222→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
223→    }
224→
225→    fun onSiteNameSkipped() {
226→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteName = null)
227→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
228→    }
229→
230→    fun onSiteNameEntered(siteName: String) {
231→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteName = siteName)
232→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
233→    }
234→
235→    fun onDesignSelected(siteDesign: String) {
236→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(siteDesign = siteDesign)
237→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
238→    }
239→
240→    fun onBackPressed() {
241→        return if (wizardManager.isLastStep()) {
242→            if (siteCreationState.result is Completed) {
243→                exitFlow(false)
244→            } else {
245→                _dialogAction.value = DialogHolder(
246→                    tag = TAG_WARNING_DIALOG,
247→                    title = null,
248→                    message = UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_preview_back_pressed_warning),
249→                    positiveButton = UiStringRes(R.string.exit),
250→                    negativeButton = UiStringRes(R.string.cancel)
251→                )
252→            }
253→        } else {
254→            wizardManager.onBackPressed()
255→            _onBackPressedObservable.call()
256→        }
257→    }
258→
259→    private fun clearOldSiteCreationState(wizardStep: SiteCreationStep) {
260→        if (wizardStep == SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS) {
261→            siteCreationState.domain?.let {
262→                siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(domain = null)
263→            }
264→        }
265→        if (wizardStep == SiteCreationStep.PLANS) {
266→            siteCreationState.plan?.let {
267→                siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(plan = null)
268→            }
269→        }
270→    }
271→
272→    fun onDomainsScreenFinished(domain: DomainModel) {
273→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(domain = domain)
274→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
275→    }
276→
277→    fun onPlanSelection(plan: PlanModel) {
278→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(plan = plan)
279→        if (plan.productSlug == "free_plan") {
280→            // if they select a paid domain, then choose a free plan, with free domain on plan selection screen
281→            siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(
282→                domain = DomainModel(
283→                    domainName = plan.productName.orEmpty(),
284→                    isFree = true,
285→                    cost = "",
286→                    productId = 0,
287→                    supportsPrivacy = false
288→                )
289→            )
290→        }
291→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
292→    }
293→
294→    fun screenTitleForWizardStep(step: SiteCreationStep): SiteCreationScreenTitle {
295→        val stepPosition = wizardManager.stepPosition(step)
296→        val stepCount = wizardManager.stepsCount
297→        val firstStep = stepPosition == 1
298→        val lastStep = stepPosition == stepCount
299→        val singleInBetweenStepDomains = step.name == SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS.name
300→
301→        return when {
302→            firstStep -> ScreenTitleGeneral(R.string.new_site_creation_screen_title_general)
303→            lastStep -> ScreenTitleEmpty
304→            singleInBetweenStepDomains -> ScreenTitleGeneral(R.string.new_site_creation_domain_header_title)
305→            else -> ScreenTitleStepCount(
306→                R.string.new_site_creation_screen_title_step_count,
307→                stepCount - 2, // -2 -> first = general title (Create Site), last item = empty title
308→                stepPosition - 1 // -1 -> first item has general title - Create Site
309→            )
310→        }
311→    }
312→
313→    fun onCartCreated(checkoutDetails: CheckoutDetails) {
314→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(result = CreatedButNotFetched.InCart(checkoutDetails.site))
315→        domainsRegistrationTracker.trackDomainsPurchaseWebviewViewed(checkoutDetails.site, isSiteCreation = true)
316→        _showDomainCheckout.value = checkoutDetails
317→    }
318→
319→    fun onCheckoutResult(event: DomainRegistrationCompletedEvent?) {
320→        if (event == null) return onBackPressed()
321→        domainsRegistrationTracker.trackDomainsPurchaseDomainSuccess(isSiteCreation = true)
322→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.run {
323→            check(result is CreatedButNotFetched.InCart)
324→            copy(
325→                result = CreatedButNotFetched.DomainRegistrationPurchased(
326→                    event.domainName,
327→                    event.email,
328→                    result.site,
329→                )
330→            )
331→        }
332→        wizardManager.showNextStep()
333→    }
334→
335→    fun onFreeSiteCreated(site: SiteModel) {
336→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(result = CreatedButNotFetched.NotInLocalDb(site))
337→        if (checkNotNull(siteCreationState.domain).isFree) {
338→            wizardManager.showNextStep()
339→        }
340→    }
341→
342→    fun onWizardCancelled() {
343→        _onCompleted.value = NotCreated to isSiteTitleTaskCompleted()
344→    }
345→
346→    fun onWizardFinished(result: Created) {
347→        siteCreationState = siteCreationState.copy(result = result)
348→        _onCompleted.value = result to isSiteTitleTaskCompleted()
349→    }
350→
351→    private fun isSiteTitleTaskCompleted() = !siteCreationState.siteName.isNullOrBlank()
352→
353→    /**
354→     * Exits the flow and tracks an event when the user force-exits the "site creation in progress" before it completes.
355→     */
356→    private fun exitFlow(forceExit: Boolean) {
357→        if (forceExit) {
358→            tracker.trackFlowExited()
359→        }
360→        _exitFlowObservable.call()
361→    }
362→
363→    fun onPositiveDialogButtonClicked(instanceTag: String) {
364→        check(instanceTag == TAG_WARNING_DIALOG) { "Unknown dialog tag: $instanceTag" }
365→        exitFlow(true)
366→    }
367→
368→    fun onNegativeDialogButtonClicked(instanceTag: String) {
369→        check(instanceTag == TAG_WARNING_DIALOG) { "Unknown dialog tag: $instanceTag" }
370→        // do nothing
371→    }
372→
373→    sealed class SiteCreationScreenTitle {
374→        data class ScreenTitleStepCount(@StringRes val resId: Int, val stepsCount: Int, val stepPosition: Int) :
375→            SiteCreationScreenTitle()
376→
377→        data class ScreenTitleGeneral(@StringRes val resId: Int) :
378→            SiteCreationScreenTitle()
379→
380→        object ScreenTitleEmpty : SiteCreationScreenTitle() {
381→            const val screenTitle = ""
382→        }
383→    }
384→}

 40→@HiltViewModel
 41→class SitePreviewViewModel @Inject constructor(
 42→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 43→    private val siteStore: SiteStore,
 44→    private val fetchWpComSiteUseCase: FetchWpComSiteUseCase,
 45→    private val urlUtils: UrlUtilsWrapper,
 46→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
 47→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 48→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 49→) : ViewModel(), CoroutineScope {
 50→    init {
 51→        dispatcher.register(fetchWpComSiteUseCase)
 52→    }
 53→
 54→    override fun onCleared() {
 55→        super.onCleared()
 56→        dispatcher.unregister(fetchWpComSiteUseCase)
 57→        job.cancel()
 58→    }
 59→
 60→    private val job = Job()
 61→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 62→        get() = bgDispatcher + job
 63→    private var isStarted = false
 64→    private var webviewFullyLoadedTracked = false
 65→
 66→    private var siteDesign: String? = null
 67→    private var isFree: Boolean = true
 68→
 69→    private lateinit var result: Created
 70→    private lateinit var domainName: String
 71→
 72→    private val _uiState: MutableLiveData<SitePreviewUiState> = MutableLiveData()
 73→    val uiState: LiveData<SitePreviewUiState> = _uiState
 74→
 75→    private val _preloadPreview: MutableLiveData<String> = MutableLiveData()
 76→    val preloadPreview: LiveData<String> = _preloadPreview
 77→
 78→    private val _onOkButtonClicked = SingleLiveEvent<Created>()
 79→    val onOkButtonClicked: LiveData<Created> = _onOkButtonClicked
 80→
 81→    fun start(siteCreationState: SiteCreationState) {
 82→        if (isStarted) return else isStarted = true
 83→        require(siteCreationState.result is Created)
 84→        siteDesign = siteCreationState.siteDesign
 85→        result = siteCreationState.result
 86→        isFree = requireNotNull(siteCreationState.domain).isFree
 87→        domainName = requireNotNull(siteCreationState.domain).domainName
 88→        startPreLoadingWebView()
 89→        if (result is CreatedButNotFetched) {
 90→            launch {
 91→                fetchNewlyCreatedSiteModel(result.site.siteId)?.let {
 92→                    result = Completed(it)
 93→                }
 94→            }
 95→        }
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    fun onOkButtonClicked() {
 99→        tracker.trackPreviewOkButtonTapped()
100→        _onOkButtonClicked.postValue(result)
101→    }
102→
103→    private fun startPreLoadingWebView() {
104→        tracker.trackPreviewLoading(siteDesign)
105→        launch {
106→            /**
107→             * If the webview is still not loaded after some delay, we'll show the loading shimmer animation instead
108→             * of the full screen progress, so the user is not blocked for taking actions.
109→             */
110→            withContext(mainDispatcher) {
111→                if (uiState.value !is SitePreviewContentUiState) {
112→                    tracker.trackPreviewWebviewShown(siteDesign)
113→                    updateUiState(SitePreviewLoadingShimmerState(isFree, createSitePreviewData()))
114→                }
115→            }
116→        }
117→        // Load the newly created site in the webview
118→        result.site.url?.let { url ->
119→            val urlToLoad = urlUtils.addUrlSchemeIfNeeded(
120→                url = url,
121→                addHttps = isWordPressComSubDomain(url)
122→            )
123→            AppLog.v(T.SITE_CREATION, "Site preview will load for url: $urlToLoad")
124→            _preloadPreview.postValue(urlToLoad)
125→        }
126→    }
127→
128→    /**
129→     * Fetch newly created site model - supports retry with linear backoff.
130→     */
131→    private suspend fun fetchNewlyCreatedSiteModel(remoteSiteId: Long): SiteModel? {
132→        val onSiteFetched = fetchWpComSiteUseCase.fetchSiteWithRetry(remoteSiteId)
133→        return if (!onSiteFetched.isError) {
134→            return requireNotNull(siteStore.getSiteBySiteId(remoteSiteId)) {
135→                "Site successfully fetched but has not been found in the local db."
136→            }
137→        } else {
138→            null
139→        }
140→    }
141→
142→    fun onUrlLoaded() {
143→        if (!webviewFullyLoadedTracked) {
144→            webviewFullyLoadedTracked = true
145→            tracker.trackPreviewWebviewFullyLoaded(siteDesign)
146→        }
147→        /**
148→         * Update the ui state if the loading or error screen is being shown.
149→         * In other words don't update it after a configuration change.
150→         */
151→        if (uiState.value !is SitePreviewContentUiState) {
152→            updateUiState(SitePreviewContentUiState(isFree, createSitePreviewData()))
153→        }
154→    }
155→
156→    fun onWebViewError() {
157→        if (uiState.value !is SitePreviewWebErrorUiState) {
158→            updateUiState(SitePreviewWebErrorUiState(isFree, createSitePreviewData()))
159→        }
160→    }
161→
162→    private fun createSitePreviewData(): UrlData {
163→        val url = domainName
164→        val subDomain = urlUtils.extractSubDomain(url)
165→        val fullUrl = urlUtils.addUrlSchemeIfNeeded(url, true)
166→        val subDomainIndices = 0 to subDomain.length
167→        val domainIndices = subDomainIndices.second.coerceAtMost(url.length) to url.length
168→        return UrlData(
169→            fullUrl,
170→            url,
171→            subDomainIndices,
172→            domainIndices
173→        )
174→    }
175→
176→    private fun updateUiState(uiState: SitePreviewUiState) {
177→        _uiState.value = uiState
178→    }
179→
180→    sealed class SitePreviewUiState(
181→        open val urlData: UrlData,
182→        val webViewVisibility: Boolean = false,
183→        val webViewErrorVisibility: Boolean = false,
184→        val shimmerVisibility: Boolean = false,
185→        val subtitle: UiString,
186→        val caption: UiString?,
187→    ) {
188→        data class SitePreviewContentUiState(
189→            val isFree: Boolean,
190→            override val urlData: UrlData,
191→        ) : SitePreviewUiState(
192→            urlData = urlData,
193→            webViewVisibility = true,
194→            webViewErrorVisibility = false,
195→            subtitle = getSubtitle(isFree),
196→            caption = getCaption(isFree),
197→        )
198→
199→        data class SitePreviewWebErrorUiState(
200→            val isFree: Boolean,
201→            override val urlData: UrlData,
202→        ) : SitePreviewUiState(
203→            urlData = urlData,
204→            webViewVisibility = false,
205→            webViewErrorVisibility = true,
206→            subtitle = getSubtitle(isFree),
207→            caption = getCaption(isFree),
208→        )
209→
210→        data class SitePreviewLoadingShimmerState(
211→            val isFree: Boolean,
212→            override val urlData: UrlData,
213→        ) : SitePreviewUiState(
214→            urlData = urlData,
215→            shimmerVisibility = true,
216→            subtitle = getSubtitle(isFree),
217→            caption = getCaption(isFree),
218→        )
219→
220→        companion object {
221→            private fun getSubtitle(isFree: Boolean): UiString {
222→                return if (isFree) {
223→                    UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_preview_subtitle)
224→                } else {
225→                    UiStringResWithParams(
226→                        R.string.new_site_creation_preview_subtitle_paid,
227→                        UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_preview_subtitle),
228→                    )
229→                }
230→            }
231→
232→            private fun getCaption(isFree: Boolean): UiStringRes? {
233→                return UiStringRes(R.string.new_site_creation_preview_caption_paid).takeIf { !isFree }
234→            }
235→        }
236→
237→        data class UrlData(
238→            val fullUrl: String,
239→            val shortUrl: String,
240→            val domainIndices: Pair<Int, Int>,
241→            val subDomainIndices: Pair<Int, Int>
242→        )
243→    }
244→}

 56→class SiteCreationProgressViewModel @Inject constructor(
 57→    private val networkUtils: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 58→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
 59→    private val createCartUseCase: CreateCartUseCase,
 60→    @Named(UI_THREAD) mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 61→) : ScopedViewModel(mainDispatcher) {
 62→    private var loadingAnimationJob: Job? = null
 63→
 64→    private lateinit var siteCreationState: SiteCreationState
 65→    private lateinit var domain: DomainModel
 66→    private lateinit var site: SiteModel
 67→
 68→    private var lastReceivedServiceState: SiteCreationServiceState? = null
 69→    private var serviceStateForRetry: SiteCreationServiceState? = null
 70→
 71→    private val _uiState: MutableLiveData<SiteProgressUiState> = MutableLiveData()
 72→    val uiState: LiveData<SiteProgressUiState> = _uiState
 73→
 74→    private val _startCreateSiteService: SingleLiveEvent<StartServiceData> = SingleLiveEvent()
 75→    val startCreateSiteService: LiveData<StartServiceData> = _startCreateSiteService
 76→
 77→    private val _onHelpClicked = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
 78→    val onHelpClicked: LiveData<Unit?> = _onHelpClicked
 79→
 80→    private val _onCancelWizardClicked = SingleLiveEvent<Unit?>()
 81→    val onCancelWizardClicked: LiveData<Unit?> = _onCancelWizardClicked
 82→
 83→    private val _onFreeSiteCreated = SingleLiveEvent<SiteModel>()
 84→    val onFreeSiteCreated: LiveData<SiteModel> = _onFreeSiteCreated
 85→
 86→    private val _onCartCreated = SingleLiveEvent<CheckoutDetails>()
 87→    val onCartCreated: LiveData<CheckoutDetails> = _onCartCreated
 88→
 89→    override fun onCleared() {
 90→        super.onCleared()
 91→        loadingAnimationJob?.cancel()
 92→        createCartUseCase.clear()
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun start(siteCreationState: SiteCreationState) {
 96→        if (siteCreationState.result is Created) {
 97→            check(siteCreationState.result !is Completed) { "Unexpected state on progress screen." }
 98→            // reuse the previously blog when returning with the same domain
 99→            if (siteCreationState.domain == domain) {
100→                site = siteCreationState.result.site
101→                if (siteCreationState.result is InCart) {
102→                    createCart()
103→                }
104→                return
105→            }
106→        }
107→        this.siteCreationState = siteCreationState
108→        domain = requireNotNull(siteCreationState.domain) { "domain required to create a site" }
109→
110→        runLoadingAnimationUi()
111→        startCreateSiteService()
112→    }
113→
114→    private fun startCreateSiteService(previousState: SiteCreationServiceState? = null) {
115→        if (networkUtils.isNetworkAvailable()) {
116→            siteCreationState.let { state ->
117→                // A non-null [segmentId] may invalidate the [siteDesign] selection
118→                // https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/13749
119→                val segmentIdentifier = state.segmentId.takeIf { state.siteDesign != null }
120→                val serviceData = SiteCreationServiceData(
121→                    segmentIdentifier,
122→                    state.siteDesign,
123→                    domain.domainName,
124→                    state.siteName,
125→                    domain.isFree,
126→                )
127→                _startCreateSiteService.value = StartServiceData(serviceData, previousState)
128→            }
129→        } else {
130→            showFullscreenErrorWithDelay()
131→        }
132→    }
133→
134→    fun retry() {
135→        when (uiState.value) {
136→            is GenericError,
137→            is ConnectionError -> startCreateSiteService(serviceStateForRetry)
138→
139→            is CartError -> createCart()
140→            else -> error("Unexpected state for retry: ${uiState.value}")
141→        }
142→        runLoadingAnimationUi()
143→    }
144→
145→    fun onHelpClicked() = _onHelpClicked.call()
146→
147→    fun onCancelWizardClicked() = _onCancelWizardClicked.call()
148→
149→    private fun showFullscreenErrorWithDelay() {
150→        runLoadingAnimationUi()
151→        launch {
152→            // We show the loading indicator for a bit so the user has some feedback when they press retry
153→            delay(CONNECTION_ERROR_DELAY_TO_SHOW_LOADING_STATE)
154→            tracker.trackErrorShown(ERROR_CONTEXT, INTERNET_UNAVAILABLE_ERROR)
155→            updateUiState(ConnectionError)
156→        }
157→    }
158→
159→    /**
160→     * The service automatically shows system notifications when site creation is in progress and the app is in
161→     * the background. We need to connect to the `AutoForeground` service from the View(Fragment), as only the View
162→     * knows when the app is in the background. Required parameter for `ServiceEventConnection` is also
163→     * the observer/listener of the `SiteCreationServiceState` (VM in our case), therefore we can't simply register
164→     * to the EventBus from the ViewModel and we have to use `sticky` events instead.
165→     */
166→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND, sticky = true)
167→    @Suppress("unused")
168→    fun onSiteCreationServiceStateUpdated(event: SiteCreationServiceState) {
169→        if (lastReceivedServiceState == event) return // filter out events which we've already received
170→        lastReceivedServiceState = event
171→        when (event.step) {
172→            IDLE, CREATE_SITE -> Unit
173→            SUCCESS -> {
174→                site = mapPayloadToSiteModel(event.payload)
175→                _onFreeSiteCreated.postValue(site) // MainVM will navigate forward if the domain is free
176→                if (!domain.isFree && siteCreationState.plan?.productId != 0) {
177→                    createCart()
178→                }
179→            }
180→
181→            FAILURE -> {
182→                serviceStateForRetry = event.payload as SiteCreationServiceState
183→                tracker.trackErrorShown(
184→                    ERROR_CONTEXT,
185→                    UNKNOWN,
186→                    "SiteCreation service failed"
187→                )
188→                updateUiStateAsync(GenericError)
189→            }
190→        }
191→    }
192→
193→    private fun mapPayloadToSiteModel(payload: Any?): SiteModel {
194→        require(payload is Pair<*, *>) { "Expected Pair in Payload, got: $payload" }
195→        val (blogId, blogUrl) = payload
196→        require(blogId is Long) { "Expected the 1st element in the Payload Pair to be a Long, got: $blogId" }
197→        require(blogUrl is String) { "Expected the 2nd element in the Payload Pair to be a Long, got: $blogUrl" }
198→        return SiteModel().apply { siteId = blogId; url = blogUrl }
199→    }
200→
201→    private fun createCart() = launch {
202→        AppLog.d(T.SITE_CREATION, "Creating cart: $domain")
203→
204→        val event = createCartUseCase.execute(
205→            site,
206→            domain.productId,
207→            domain.domainName,
208→            domain.supportsPrivacy,
209→            false,
210→            planProductId = siteCreationState.plan?.productId
211→        )
212→
213→        if (event.isError) {
214→            AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, "Failed cart creation: ${event.error.message}")
215→            updateUiStateAsync(CartError)
216→        } else {
217→            AppLog.d(T.SITE_CREATION, "Successful cart creation: ${event.cartDetails}")
218→            _onCartCreated.postValue(CheckoutDetails(site, domain.domainName))
219→        }
220→    }
221→
222→    private fun runLoadingAnimationUi() {
223→        loadingAnimationJob?.cancel()
224→        loadingAnimationJob = launch {
225→            loadingTexts.forEachIndexed { i, uiString ->
226→                updateUiState(
227→                    Loading(
228→                        animate = i != 0, // the first text should appear without an animation
229→                        loadingTextResId = uiString
230→                    )
231→                )
232→                delay(LOADING_STATE_TEXT_ANIMATION_DELAY)
233→            }
234→        }
235→    }
236→
237→    private fun updateUiState(uiState: SiteProgressUiState) {
238→        if (uiState !is Loading) loadingAnimationJob?.cancel()
239→        _uiState.value = uiState
240→    }
241→
242→    private fun updateUiStateAsync(uiState: SiteProgressUiState) {
243→        if (uiState !is Loading) loadingAnimationJob?.cancel()
244→        _uiState.postValue(uiState)
245→    }
246→
247→    sealed class SiteProgressUiState(
248→        val progressLayoutVisibility: Boolean = false,
249→        val errorLayoutVisibility: Boolean = false
250→    ) {
251→        data class Loading(val loadingTextResId: UiString, val animate: Boolean) :
252→            SiteProgressUiState(progressLayoutVisibility = true)
253→
254→        sealed class Error constructor(
255→            val titleResId: Int,
256→            val subtitleResId: Int? = null,
257→            val showContactSupport: Boolean = false,
258→            val showCancelWizardButton: Boolean = true
259→        ) : SiteProgressUiState(errorLayoutVisibility = true) {
260→            object GenericError : Error(
261→                R.string.site_creation_error_generic_title,
262→                R.string.site_creation_error_generic_subtitle,
263→                showContactSupport = true
264→            )
265→
266→            object CartError : Error(
267→                R.string.site_creation_error_generic_title,
268→                R.string.site_creation_error_cart_subtitle,
269→                showContactSupport = true
270→            )
271→
272→            object ConnectionError : Error(
273→                R.string.no_network_message
274→            )
275→        }
276→    }
277→
278→    data class StartServiceData(
279→        val serviceData: SiteCreationServiceData,
280→        val previousState: SiteCreationServiceState?
281→    )
282→}

 72→@AndroidEntryPoint
 73→class SiteCreationActivity : LocaleAwareActivity(),
 74→    IntentsScreenListener,
 75→    SiteNameScreenListener,
 76→    DomainsScreenListener,
 77→    PlansScreenListener,
 78→    OnHelpClickedListener,
 79→    BasicDialogPositiveClickInterface,
 80→    BasicDialogNegativeClickInterface {
 81→    @Inject
 82→    internal lateinit var uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 83→
 84→    @Inject
 85→    internal lateinit var siteNameFeatureConfig: SiteNameFeatureConfig
 86→    private val mainViewModel: SiteCreationMainVM by viewModels()
 87→    private val hppViewModel: HomePagePickerViewModel by viewModels()
 88→    private val siteCreationIntentsViewModel: SiteCreationIntentsViewModel by viewModels()
 89→    private val siteCreationSiteNameViewModel: SiteCreationSiteNameViewModel by viewModels()
 90→    private val jetpackFullScreenViewModel: JetpackFeatureFullScreenOverlayViewModel by viewModels()
 91→    private val progressViewModel: SiteCreationProgressViewModel by viewModels()
 92→    private val previewViewModel: SitePreviewViewModel by viewModels()
 93→
 94→    @Inject
 95→    internal lateinit var jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil: JetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil
 96→
 97→    @Inject
 98→    internal lateinit var activityLauncherWrapper: ActivityLauncherWrapper
 99→
100→    private val backPressedCallback = object : OnBackPressedCallback(true) {
101→        override fun handleOnBackPressed() {
102→            mainViewModel.onBackPressed()
103→        }
104→    }
105→
106→    private val domainCheckoutActivityLauncher = registerForActivityResult(OpenCheckout()) {
107→        mainViewModel.onCheckoutResult(it)
108→    }
109→
110→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
111→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
112→        setContentView(R.layout.site_creation_activity)
113→
114→        onBackPressedDispatcher.addCallback(this, backPressedCallback)
115→
116→        mainViewModel.start(savedInstanceState, getSiteCreationSource())
117→        mainViewModel.preloadThumbnails(this)
118→
119→        observeVMState()
120→        observeOverlayEvents(savedInstanceState)
121→    }
122→
123→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
124→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
125→        mainViewModel.writeToBundle(outState)
126→    }
127→
128→    @Suppress("LongMethod")
129→    private fun observeVMState() {
130→        mainViewModel.navigationTargetObservable.observe(this, ::showStep)
131→        mainViewModel.onCompleted.observe(this) { (result, isTitleTaskComplete) ->
132→            val intent = Intent().apply {
133→                putExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_LOCAL_ID, (result as? Created)?.site?.id)
134→                putExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, isTitleTaskComplete)
135→                // Let `SitePickerActivity` handle this with a SnackBar message
136→                putExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_CREATED_BUT_NOT_FETCHED, result is CreatedButNotFetched)
137→            }
138→            setResult(if (result is Completed) Activity.RESULT_OK else Activity.RESULT_CANCELED, intent)
139→            finish()
140→        }
141→        mainViewModel.dialogActionObservable.observe(this) {
142→            it?.show(this, supportFragmentManager, uiHelpers)
143→        }
144→        mainViewModel.exitFlowObservable.observe(this) {
145→            setResult(Activity.RESULT_CANCELED)
146→            finish()
147→        }
148→        mainViewModel.onBackPressedObservable.observe(this) {
149→            ActivityUtils.hideKeyboard(this)
150→            onBackPressedDispatcher.onBackPressedCompat(backPressedCallback)
151→        }
152→        mainViewModel.showDomainCheckout.observe(this, domainCheckoutActivityLauncher::launch)
153→        siteCreationIntentsViewModel.onBackButtonPressed.observe(this) { mainViewModel.onBackPressed() }
154→        siteCreationIntentsViewModel.onSkipButtonPressed.observe(this) { mainViewModel.onSiteIntentSkipped() }
155→        siteCreationSiteNameViewModel.onBackButtonPressed.observe(this) {
156→            mainViewModel.onBackPressed()
157→            ActivityUtils.hideKeyboard(this)
158→        }
159→        siteCreationSiteNameViewModel.onSkipButtonPressed.observe(this) {
160→            ActivityUtils.hideKeyboard(this)
161→            mainViewModel.onSiteNameSkipped()
162→        }
163→        hppViewModel.onBackButtonPressed.observe(this) { mainViewModel.onBackPressed() }
164→        hppViewModel.onDesignActionPressed.observe(this) { mainViewModel.onDesignSelected(it.template) }
165→        progressViewModel.onCancelWizardClicked.observe(this) { mainViewModel.onWizardCancelled() }
166→        progressViewModel.onFreeSiteCreated.observe(this, mainViewModel::onFreeSiteCreated)
167→        progressViewModel.onCartCreated.observe(this, mainViewModel::onCartCreated)
168→        previewViewModel.onOkButtonClicked.observe(this, mainViewModel::onWizardFinished)
169→    }
170→
171→    private fun observeOverlayEvents(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
172→        if(BuildConfig.IS_JETPACK_APP)
173→            return
174→
175→        val fragment =  if (savedInstanceState == null) {
176→            JetpackFeatureFullScreenOverlayFragment
177→                .newInstance(
178→                    isSiteCreationOverlay = true,
179→                    siteCreationSource = getSiteCreationSource()
180→                )
181→        }else {
182→            supportFragmentManager.findFragmentByTag(JetpackFeatureFullScreenOverlayFragment.TAG)
183→                    as JetpackFeatureFullScreenOverlayFragment
184→        }
185→
186→        jetpackFullScreenViewModel.action.observe(this) { action ->
187→            if (mainViewModel.siteCreationDisabled) finish()
188→            when (action) {
189→                is OpenPlayStore -> {
190→                    fragment.dismiss()
191→                    activityLauncherWrapper.openPlayStoreLink(this, JETPACK_PACKAGE_NAME)
192→                }
193→                is DismissDialog -> {
194→                    fragment.dismiss()
195→                }
196→                else -> fragment.dismiss()
197→            }.exhaustive
198→        }
199→
200→        mainViewModel.showJetpackOverlay.observeEvent(this) {
201→            if (mainViewModel.siteCreationDisabled)
202→                showFragment(fragment, JetpackFeatureFullScreenOverlayFragment.TAG)
203→            else fragment.show(supportFragmentManager, JetpackFeatureFullScreenOverlayFragment.TAG)
204→        }
205→    }
206→
207→    private fun getSiteCreationSource(): SiteCreationSource {
208→        val siteCreationSource = intent.extras?.getString(ARG_CREATE_SITE_SOURCE)

236→    private fun showStep(target: WizardNavigationTarget<SiteCreationStep, SiteCreationState>) {
237→        val screenTitle = getScreenTitle(target.wizardStep)
238→        val fragment = when (target.wizardStep) {
239→            INTENTS -> SiteCreationIntentsFragment()
240→            SITE_NAME -> SiteCreationSiteNameFragment.newInstance(target.wizardState.siteIntent)
241→            SITE_DESIGNS -> {
242→                // Cancel preload job before displaying the theme picker.
243→                mainViewModel.preloadingJob?.cancel("Preload did not complete before theme picker was shown.")
244→                HomePagePickerFragment.newInstance(target.wizardState.siteIntent)
245→            }
246→            DOMAINS -> SiteCreationDomainsFragment.newInstance(screenTitle)
247→            PLANS -> SiteCreationPlansFragment.newInstance(target.wizardState)
248→            PROGRESS -> SiteCreationProgressFragment.newInstance(target.wizardState)
249→            SITE_PREVIEW -> SiteCreationPreviewFragment.newInstance(screenTitle, target.wizardState)
250→        }
251→        showFragment(fragment, target.wizardStep.toString(), target.wizardStep != SITE_PREVIEW)
252→    }

256→            is ScreenTitleStepCount -> getString(
257→                screenTitleData.resId,
258→                screenTitleData.stepPosition,
259→                screenTitleData.stepsCount
260→            )
261→            is ScreenTitleGeneral -> getString(screenTitleData.resId)
262→            is ScreenTitleEmpty -> screenTitleData.screenTitle
263→        }
264→    }

266→    private fun showFragment(fragment: Fragment, tag: String, slideIn: Boolean = true) {
267→        supportFragmentManager.commit {
268→            if (supportFragmentManager.findFragmentById(R.id.fragment_container) != null) {
269→                // add to back stack and animate all screen except of the first one
270→                addToBackStack(null)
271→                if (slideIn) {
272→                    setCustomAnimations(
273→                        R.anim.activity_slide_in_from_right, R.anim.activity_slide_out_to_left,
274→                        R.anim.activity_slide_in_from_left, R.anim.activity_slide_out_to_right
275→                    )
276→                } else {
277→                    setCustomAnimations(R.anim.fade_in, R.anim.fade_out, R.anim.fade_in, R.anim.fade_out)
278→                }
279→            }
280→            replace(R.id.fragment_container, fragment, tag)
281→        }
282→    }

 2→
 3→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.Subscribe
 4→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.ThreadMode

 7→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.NewSitePayload
 9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.OnNewSiteCreated
10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.SiteVisibility
11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.SiteVisibility.PUBLIC
12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceData
13→import org.wordpress.android.util.UrlUtilsWrapper
14→import javax.inject.Inject
15→import kotlin.coroutines.Continuation
16→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
17→import kotlin.coroutines.suspendCoroutine
18→
19→/**
20→ * Transforms OnNewSiteCreated EventBus event to a coroutine.
21→ */
22→class CreateSiteUseCase @Inject constructor(
23→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
24→    @Suppress("unused") private val siteStore: SiteStore,
25→    private val urlUtilsWrapper: UrlUtilsWrapper
26→) {
27→    private var continuation: Continuation<OnNewSiteCreated>? = null
28→
29→    @Suppress("UseCheckOrError")
30→    suspend fun createSite(
31→        siteData: SiteCreationServiceData,
32→        languageWordPressId: String,
33→        timeZoneId: String,
34→        siteVisibility: SiteVisibility = PUBLIC,
35→        dryRun: Boolean = false
36→    ): OnNewSiteCreated {
37→        if (continuation != null) {
38→            throw IllegalStateException("Create site request has already been sent.")
39→        }
40→        /*
41→         * To create a site with WordPress.com sub-domain, we need to pass the domain name without the "wordpress.com"
42→         * whereas to create a site with other domains, we need to pass the full url. This issue is addressed
43→         * in this use case since it's closest to the network layer.
44→         *
45→         * Ideally API wouldn't work like this or if it does FluxC is the one that handles the issue. However, at the
46→         * time of this comment, changing FluxC's Payload might end up affecting the old site creation flow,
47→         * so the workaround is applied here instead.
48→         */
49→        val domain = when {
50→            siteData.domain.isNullOrEmpty() -> null
51→            isWordPressComSubDomain(siteData.domain) -> urlUtilsWrapper.extractSubDomain(siteData.domain)
52→            else -> siteData.domain
53→        }
54→        return suspendCoroutine { cont ->
55→            val newSitePayload = NewSitePayload(
56→                domain,
57→                siteData.title,
58→                languageWordPressId,
59→                timeZoneId,
60→                siteVisibility,
61→                siteData.segmentId,
62→                siteData.siteDesign,
63→                dryRun,
64→                findAvailableUrl = if (siteData.isFree) null else true
65→            )
66→            continuation = cont
67→            dispatcher.dispatch(SiteActionBuilder.newCreateNewSiteAction(newSitePayload))
68→        }
69→    }
70→
71→    @Suppress("unused")
72→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND)
73→    fun onNewSiteCreated(event: OnNewSiteCreated) {
74→        continuation?.resume(event)
75→        continuation = null
76→    }
77→}
78→
79→fun isWordPressComSubDomain(url: String) = url.endsWith(".wordpress.com")

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.plans
  2→
  3→import android.net.Uri
  4→import android.text.TextUtils
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
  6→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
  7→import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.channels.Channel
  9→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
 10→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
 11→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.receiveAsFlow
 12→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 13→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.AccountStore
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.WPWebViewActivity
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.SiteCreationState
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.domains.DomainModel
 20→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 21→import org.wordpress.android.util.NetworkUtilsWrapper
 22→import javax.inject.Inject
 23→
 24→@HiltViewModel
 25→class SiteCreationPlansViewModel @Inject constructor(
 26→    private val accountStore: AccountStore,
 27→    private val siteStore: SiteStore,
 28→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper
 29→) : ViewModel() {
 30→    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow<SiteCreationPlansUiState>(SiteCreationPlansUiState.Preparing)
 31→    val uiState = _uiState as StateFlow<SiteCreationPlansUiState>
 32→
 33→    private val _actionEvents = Channel<SiteCreationPlansActionEvent>(Channel.BUFFERED)
 34→    val actionEvents = _actionEvents.receiveAsFlow()
 35→
 36→    private lateinit var domainName: DomainModel
 37→
 38→    fun start(siteCreationState: SiteCreationState) {
 39→        domainName = requireNotNull(siteCreationState.domain)
 40→        showPlans()
 41→    }
 42→
 43→    fun onPlanSelected(uri: Uri) {
 44→        AppLog.d(AppLog.T.PLANS, uri.toString())
 45→
 46→        val planId = uri.getQueryParameter(PLAN_ID_PARAM)?.toInt() ?: 0
 47→        val planSlug = uri.getQueryParameter(PLAN_SLUG_PARAM).orEmpty()
 48→
 49→        val planModel = PlanModel(
 50→            productId = planId,
 51→            productSlug = planSlug,
 52→            productName = domainName.domainName,
 53→            isCurrentPlan = false,
 54→            hasDomainCredit = false
 55→        )
 56→        postActionEvent(SiteCreationPlansActionEvent.CreateSite(planModel))
 57→    }
 58→
 59→    fun onUrlLoaded() {
 60→        postUiState(SiteCreationPlansUiState.Loaded)
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    fun onWebViewError() {
 64→        postUiState(SiteCreationPlansUiState.GenericError(this@SiteCreationPlansViewModel::launchPlans))
 65→    }
 66→
 67→    private fun showPlans() {
 68→        postUiState(SiteCreationPlansUiState.Preparing)
 69→        if (!checkForInternetConnectivityAndPostErrorIfNeeded()) return
 70→        if (!validateAndPostErrorIfNeeded()) return
 71→        launchPlans()
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    private fun launchPlans() {
 75→        val url = createURL()
 76→        AppLog.d(AppLog.T.PLANS, url)
 77→
 78→        val addressToLoad = prepareAddressToLoad(url)
 79→        postUiState(SiteCreationPlansUiState.Prepared(
 80→            SiteCreationPlansModel(
 81→                enableJavascript = true,
 82→                enableDomStorage = true,
 83→                userAgent = WordPress.getUserAgent(),
 84→                enableChromeClient = true,
 85→                url = url,
 86→                addressToLoad = addressToLoad
 87→            )
 88→        ))
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    private fun createURL(): String {
 92→        val uriBuilder = Uri.Builder().apply {
 93→            scheme(SCHEME)
 94→            authority(AUTHORITY)
 95→            appendPath(JETPACK_APP_PATH)
 96→            appendPath(PLANS_PATH)
 97→            if (!domainName.isFree) {
 98→                appendQueryParameter(PAID_DOMAIN_NAME, domainName.domainName)
 99→            }
100→        }
101→
102→
103→        return uriBuilder.build().toString()
104→    }
105→
106→    private fun prepareAddressToLoad(url: String): String {
107→        val username = accountStore.account.userName
108→        val accessToken = accountStore.accessToken
109→
110→        var addressToLoad = url
111→
112→        // Custom domains are not properly authenticated due to a server side(?) issue, so this gets around that
113→        if (!addressToLoad.contains(WPCOM_DOMAIN)) {
114→            val wpComSites: List<SiteModel> = siteStore.wPComSites
115→            for (siteModel in wpComSites) {
116→                // Only replace the url if we know the unmapped url and if it's a custom domain
117→                if (!TextUtils.isEmpty(siteModel.unmappedUrl)
118→                    && !siteModel.url.contains(WPCOM_DOMAIN)
119→                ) {
120→                    addressToLoad = addressToLoad.replace(siteModel.url, siteModel.unmappedUrl)
121→                }
122→            }
123→        }
124→        return WPWebViewActivity.getAuthenticationPostData(
125→            WPCOM_LOGIN_URL,
126→            addressToLoad,
127→            username,
128→            "",
129→            accessToken?:""
130→        )
131→    }
132→
133→    private fun validateAndPostErrorIfNeeded(): Boolean {
134→        if (accountStore.account.userName.isNullOrEmpty() || accountStore.accessToken.isNullOrEmpty()) {
135→            postUiState(SiteCreationPlansUiState.GenericError(this@SiteCreationPlansViewModel::showPlans))
136→            return false
137→        }
138→        return true
139→    }
140→
141→    private fun checkForInternetConnectivityAndPostErrorIfNeeded(): Boolean {
142→        if (networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) return true
143→        postUiState(SiteCreationPlansUiState.NoNetworkError(this@SiteCreationPlansViewModel::showPlans))
144→        return false
145→    }
146→
147→    private fun postUiState(state: SiteCreationPlansUiState) {
148→        viewModelScope.launch {
149→            _uiState.value = state
150→        }
151→    }
152→
153→    private fun postActionEvent(actionEvent: SiteCreationPlansActionEvent) {
154→        viewModelScope.launch {
155→            _actionEvents.send(actionEvent)
156→        }
157→    }
158→
159→    companion object {
160→        const val WPCOM_LOGIN_URL = "https://wordpress.com/wp-login.php"
161→        const val WPCOM_DOMAIN = ".wordpress.com"
162→
163→        const val SCHEME = "https"
164→        const val AUTHORITY = "wordpress.com"
165→        const val JETPACK_APP_PATH = "jetpack-app"
166→        const val PLANS_PATH = "plans"
167→        const val PLAN_ID_PARAM = "plan_id"
168→        const val PLAN_SLUG_PARAM = "plan_slug"
169→        const val PAID_DOMAIN_NAME = "paid_domain_name"
170→    }
171→}
172→
173→sealed class SiteCreationPlansActionEvent {

313→    @Test
314→    fun siteCreationStateRestored() {
315→        /* we need to model a real use case of data only existing for steps the user has visited (Segment only in
316→        this case). Otherwise, subsequent steps' state will be cleared and make the test fail. (issue #10189)*/
317→        val expectedState = SiteCreationState(segmentId = SEGMENT_ID)
318→        whenever(savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat<SiteCreationState>(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE))
319→            .thenReturn(expectedState)
320→
321→        // we need to create a new instance of the VM as the `viewModel` has already been started in setUp()
322→        val newViewModel = getNewViewModel()
323→        newViewModel.start(savedInstanceState, SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
324→
325→        /* we need to simulate navigation to the next step (Domain selection, see comment above) as
326→        wizardManager.showNextStep() isn't invoked when the VM is restored from a savedInstanceState. */
327→        wizardManagerNavigatorLiveData.value = SiteCreationStep.DOMAINS
328→
329→        newViewModel.navigationTargetObservable.observeForever(navigationTargetObserver)
330→        assertThat(currentWizardState(newViewModel)).isSameAs(expectedState)
331→    }
332→
333→    @Test
334→    fun siteCreationStepIndexRestored() {
335→        val index = 17
336→        whenever(savedInstanceState.getInt(KEY_CURRENT_STEP)).thenReturn(index)
337→
338→        // siteCreationState is not nullable - we need to set it
339→        whenever(savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat<SiteCreationState>(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE))
340→            .thenReturn(SiteCreationState())
341→
342→        // we need to create a new instance of the VM as the `viewModel` has already been started in setUp()
343→        val newViewModel = getNewViewModel()
344→        newViewModel.start(savedInstanceState, SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
345→
346→        verify(wizardManager).setCurrentStepIndex(index)
347→    }

350→    fun `given null instance state, when start, then site creation accessed including source is tracked`() {
351→        val newViewModel = getNewViewModel()
352→        newViewModel.start(null, SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
353→
354→        // Because setup is run before every test, we expect this to be tracked twice
355→        // Once on the first instantiation
356→        // Once on the new start
357→        verify(tracker, atLeastOnce()).trackSiteCreationAccessed(SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
358→    }
359→
360→    @Test
361→    fun `given instance state is not null, when start, then site creation accessed is not tracked`() {
362→        val expectedState = SiteCreationState(segmentId = SEGMENT_ID)
363→        whenever(savedInstanceState.getParcelableCompat<SiteCreationState>(KEY_SITE_CREATION_STATE))
364→            .thenReturn(expectedState)
365→
366→        val newViewModel = getNewViewModel()
367→        newViewModel.start(savedInstanceState, SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
368→
369→        // Because setup is run before every test, we expect this to be tracked on that first instance only
370→        verify(tracker, times(1)).trackSiteCreationAccessed(SiteCreationSource.UNSPECIFIED)
371→    }

373→    private fun currentWizardState(vm: SiteCreationMainVM) = vm.navigationTargetObservable.lastEvent!!.wizardState
